entry.title: Re: #CoE#HSQC if app Upload Material Inventory Price can...
entry.content:
Yes you do have to manually enter the materials and the other corresponding field values one by one manually to process it. Alternatively, please consider utilizing IRPA to process multiple materials. I would recommend you to create a CIP request for to mass update the price. Thanks.

Regards

Jai Srinivasan

entry.title: Re: Stop requirement transfer when sales order is in approval
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes. It is not possible to call oData API to update sales document when it is in approval. You could manually withdraw the workflow and update the indicator "Fixed Data and Qty", or set the indicator "Fixed Data and Qty" by default. 

In future, we would have functionality planned to withdraw workflow via API call. Please stay tuned on roadmap update. 

Best regards,

Yong

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public EditionでAPI連携で合計実際原価を反映させる方法について
entry.content:
API の中のデータを確認してみるのがいいと思います。
まずは ブラウザの Developer Tools で確認してみてください。
https://weseek.co.jp/tech/4176/https://weseek.co.jp/tech/4176/

entry.title: Compensation Statement Acknowledgement Using WalkMe
entry.content:
A question we often get asked by customers is how they can track compensation statement views and better yet employee acknowledgement of their statement outcomes.  In certain countries, the acknowledgement of statements is not only a business necessity but also a legal requirement.  Using standard SuccessFactors functionality this requirement presents some challenges but by using WalkMe tools, building out this requirement becomes easy.

WalkMe is a Digital Adoption Platform that can help organisations drive productivity and navigate changing technology landscapes and business processes.  In this use case, we have built out a guided user experience for the employee to view and acknowledge a SuccessFactors Compensation statement.

WalkMe functionality used to build this demo includes

  • Shout Outs
  • Standard design templates
  • Smart Walk Through Automation

Tracking and reporting on views and clicks is automatic through WalkMe’s Insights Dashboards.  There are ready built reports as well as the ability to create custom dashboards and these can be distributed to key stakeholders on a schedule if required.

Additional Notes:

  • WalkMe custom configuration as seen in the demo video does require additional WalkMe licences
  • Standard WalkMe content embedded in SuccessFactors is available with the H1 2025 release and does not require an additional license.  Details of standard content can be found in the H1 2025 What’s New Viewer
  • The demo video contains a custom SuccessFactors Compensation statement.  The same acknowledgement functionality is also possible using a standard statement.

Special thanks to my WalkMe colleague Paul Casaneanu for helping to showcase the WalkMe functionality as it pertains specifically to the compensation module.

entry.title: Publish Data to SOLACE using AMQP Adapter
entry.content:
Hi All,

This blog will explain steps to be able to publish data to SOLACE queue/topic using AMQP adapter

AMQP supports TCP/ web socket protocols only. I have used the TCP protocol for this case. Always, go for the connectivity test before you move forward with the actual channel configurations for AMQP.

The authentication methods for AMQP is different from other adapters.

AMQP receiver has below authentication methods:

1. None 2. SASL 3. OAuth Client Creds

AMQP sender has below authentication methods:

1. None 2. Client Certificate 3. SASL

I have used SASL as the authentication method in my case.

Push Data to SOLACE using AMQP (used in case of cloud connector is needed)

Create a demo IFLOW with the timer to trigger flow on deployment & have some static value on body in the content modifier to pass as message to the queue.

The AMQP has proxy feature (CC) which is currently missing in the AEM adapter.

Provide the connection details from the solace details captured from below:

Provide the topic or queue name used to push message

Testing:

Once it’s deployed the message is sent to Queue/topic in solace

Regards,

Rohini Potham

entry.title: Consume Data from SOLACE using AMQP
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please check my previous blog on how to push data to SOLACE using AMQP sender adapter.

Publish Data from AMQP to SOLACE 

Pull Data from SOLACE using AMQP (used in case of cloud connector is needed)

Create a demo IFLOW with sender AMQP adapter

The AMQP has proxy feature (CC) which is currently missing in the AEM adapter.

The headers/properties can be retrieved from the queue using AMQP sender adapter

Provide the connection details from the solace details captured from below:

Provide the topic or queue name used to push message

Testing:

Once it’s deployed the message is consumed from Queue/topic in solace & contents can be seen using CPI helper

Regards,

Rohini Potham

entry.title: Can you trigger a Business rule for a candidate based on whether they are Internal or External?
entry.content: We have a business rule that we only want to trigger on the application if they are External candidates - is this possible?

entry.title: SAP MDK Font-Style for iOS - change Font size?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am trying to change the Font size on different MDK controls however nothing seems to work.

Based on the documentation we should be able to use CSS attribute font-style: UIFont.textstyle however I am not able to find any place where it mentions what are the valid values under that type? I have found an Apple documentation that has some constants like "extraLargeTitle" however that doe not seem to work on a simplepropertycell or objectheader title that I tried.

Could you please advice the possible values for that CSS attribute and if it is possible indeed to change the font type/size on iOS devices ?

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP MDK Title/Sections
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am trying to create sections within my app, something like a big title and then following controls to be indented or at last without empty margin/padding to show really clear controls underneath are part the the section..

So far I have used Header object which works well if you added at the beginning of the page and you have only 1 more control underneath since following control you add is nicely indented without extra grey padding between them. However if I do the same thing after( for instance a new Object Title below the last control ) then there is no indentation and following control is separated by  a grey area. I know that each control can have each own heading but what I am looking for is more like a section big title kind of heading that shows really clear the following controls are part of that title/section and ideally they should be indented  or at least do not have the grey separation area between each control... Please advice what is the best practice here..

entry.title: SLT logging table not getting deleted /1CADMC/<DIGITS>
entry.content:
SLT logging table /1CADMC/<DIGITS> not getting deleted and around 1.5 billlion entries in the tables. 

We have new SLT system and probably this entries is from old SLT butt don't know how to get this logging table deleted. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SLT logging table not getting deleted /1CADMC/<DIGITS>
entry.content: Please follow KBA http://me.sap.com/notes/3006239 for the solution.

entry.title: Database table for business volume data is stored for a condition contract
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Below are the questions i need support on if anyone has worked on custom changes in condition contract settlement process.

Q1.What is the database table in which the Business Volume data is stored for a condition contract(The billing documents and quantities).I need to build a custom logic to fetch the data and perform some calculations on it but i am struggling to fine.

Q2.If we create custom fields in a condition contract header, is it possible to use those fields in a pricing routine or the fields absolutelty need to be part of the pricing structure?

Thanks,

entry.title: Is there a walkaround to upload excel with different Date columns in Upload Job Starter in SAC?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We create an Upload Job using the excel file that contains columns [202501,202502,....,202512] like this:

When we want to use Upload Job Starter in story to upload the excel file that contains columns[202601,202602,...,202612], it fails. We understand that's because the columns are not same as the one already mapped in Upload Job. But is there any walkaround to meet our requirement? We don't want to create another Upload Job because we have lots of files need to upload so we have to create lots of jobs. We figured out a walkaround to tranposed the column like the picture below but it's also challenging for us to apply this considering the data volume.

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: 关于 SAP 公有云（S/4HANA Cloud）的销售数据锁定
entry.content: 非常感谢，请问一下业务锁定有具体的APP吗？

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create new Migration Object using M...
entry.content:
Hi @naresha5892 

The SAP S/4HANA migration object modeler is an application that can be used to enhance the migration objects that are used in the SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit. This app cannot be used to create a new Migration object.

Note: Using the app Migration Object Modeler, it is only possible to enhance certain migration objects that are released by SAP.

There is an SAP Note for each migration object that details the structures and fields that can be enhanced for each migration object. These SAP Notes can be accessed from SAP Note 2999428.

For detailed information, as well as an example for the migration object Supplier, see:

  • https://www.sap.com/documents/2022/07/9457651c-377e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Best regards,

Irene

entry.title: How to Represent Supplier Discount as an Isolated Item in Purchase Order (SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to represent a supplier discount as an isolated item with a negative price in a purchase order. However, based on the information I've gathered, it seems that creating an item with a negative price is not supported in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

As an alternative, I used the condition type to represent the discount. However, this leads to the following challenges:

  1. The discount is distributed across all PO items, but our customer requires that the discount not affect the material prices.

  2. The discount is no longer displayed as a separate line item in the PO, since it is split among the items.

Is there a workaround or best practice to show the total discount amount separately—perhaps at the end of the PO output? Would using the Livecycle help achieve this?

Any suggestions or insights would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Where can I found the Customer - extend existing reco...
entry.content:
Hi @Ingrid_at_Applium 

I have searched in Available Migration Objects page and able to find this object.

As per help portal, Migration object Customer - extend existing record by multiple addresses is available in the approach 'Migrate Data Using Staging Tables'.

Are you using the approach other than staging table ('Migrate Data Directly from SAP System')? 

Best regards,

Irene

entry.title: Re: Split Valuation in SAP MM
entry.content: No need to activate split valuation every time it's activated by default if not go to transaction code Omw0 and activate it just once

entry.title: Re: Implementation of GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET in SAP RAP framework
entry.content: Hi Andre, the information of restriction of custom entities on expaned_entity is very useful, thanks a lot.

entry.title: Re: Extensibility Approaches in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: hello @shruthi_j_b  Can we create a custom business catalog in sap public cloud ? and use it in Custom catalog extension by creating a application ?

entry.title: Re: Automatically trigger synchronization of product cata...
entry.content:
Hello Harsha,

I believe you are adding trigger in CronJobs. You have to add into the JOB. Can you try below impex. Hope this should solve your problem

 

INSERT_UPDATE Trigger ; Job(code)[unique=true] ; cronExpression;relative[default=false];active[default=true];maxAcceptableDelay[default=-1]
; "sync productCatalog:Staged->Online";"0 0 3 * * ?";;;

 

Thank you

Vinay Kumar Samudrala

entry.title: s/4h Cloud Public is it possible to derivate the credit segment dynamically in sales orders?
entry.content:
I know that EXIT_SAPFV45K_001 is not available in s/4h Cloud Public Edition. Is there any other option to derivate dynamically the credit segment in sales order?

For my project it is not enough derivate the credit segment by sales area. We have multiples sales area for sales and distribution pupposess and split them to derivate different credit segments will increase the sales areas.

Please you help, I appreciate

entry.title: Re: Business process throwing could not translate value e...
entry.content:
First you get the CMSSiteModel. Then rertieve the Default catalog and its versions.

 

CMSSiteModel cmssitemodel = (CMSSiteModel) spring.getBean("cartDAO").getCartWithCode("1234567").getSite()
cmssitemodel.getDefaultCatalog().getCatalogVersions()

 

This works.

entry.title: Re: Filter query not working after setting target specifi...
entry.content: Hi Bill, We are using SAP MDK 24.11.2-002. Yes we did look into additional search options but it is not working.

entry.title: Re: Different number ranges for sales document type and b...
entry.content:
Please check the Blog.

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/custom-logic-to-implement-flexible-billing-document-numbering/ba-p/13565524

entry.title: Re: Stock data of serial number XXXXXXX not suitable for...
entry.content:
Hi Priti,

Open the long text of the message and the long text will show the potential issue. Furthermore, in the long text you will find a keyword "analysis" which will have a hyperlink. This will take you to a another message pop-up that will show you the inconsistency between the data of serial number in question and the goods movement data of the same serial number with the deviation that is leading to the error.

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: ObjectTable swipe behaviour not working
entry.content: Hi Bill, The issue is happening on both android and iOS. Scenario: User navigates to the Notification List. After clicking on a particular notification user navigates to notifcation detail screen. Once user comes back to Notification List the initially tapped notification is not showing swipe behaviour. Once I refresh the page, the swipe behaviour starts working.

entry.title: Re: ObjectTable swipe behaviour not working
entry.content: Also I am not able to upload any code snippet or screen recording of the issue we are facing.

entry.title: Re: Automatically trigger synchronization of product cata...
entry.content:
Hello,

Firstly we can add trigger directly to this kind of sync job. 

INSERT_UPDATE Trigger; job(code)[unique = true]               ; cronExpression
                     ; sync ****ProductCatalog\:Staged->Online ; 0 */3 * ? * *

You need to provide a escape character as above so that impex works!! 

Please test.

entry.title: Re: Connectivity Proxy Upgrade to 2.13.0
entry.content: I upgrade my connectivity proxy to version 2.14.0, same issue:

entry.title: Re: Permission to enable "Principal Permission Action" button in Backoffice without admin
entry.content:
Hello

'Principal permission action' - do you mean assign permissions option available for users/usergroups/types ?

this is enabled only for Admin i think. otherwise you need to rewrite function and assign access to another usergroup.

entry.title: Re: Native HANA / XSA CDS - annotation for 'measure'
entry.content:
i think you can build a calculation view, which can do the job easily.

or you can use cap

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/advanced/odata#aggregation-methods

entry.title: Re: Database table for business volume data is stored for...
entry.content:
Hi Priya,

Q1: Business volume will be stored in Business volume profile table. For Standard sales rebate, business volume table is VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1. To fetch the business volume for specific agreement, you need to pass the Business Volume selection criteria into this table.

Q2: Needs more info. If your business is using the Accruals posting from the customer billing document, then the custom field should be in the billing document and settlement document. If not, custom should be only in settlement document for the price calculation. Check if you want to add the custom field into Condition Contract header or Business volume selection criteria or the Pricing structure as the architecture of the condition contract is bit different from the ECC rebates.

Table to get the business volume selection criteria: WB2_D_BUSVOLBASE

Regards

Hari 

Regards

Hari

entry.title: Re: Discrete Vs repetitive Vs Process Industry in SAP PP
entry.content: Nicely written blog and lots of information

entry.title: Re: ObjectTable swipe behaviour not working
entry.content:
Hi,

//deselect the row before nav. to detail page.

context.getPageProxy().getControl('YourObjectTableSection').getSelectedItems().forEach(item => item.setSelected(false));

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Database table for business volume data is stored for...
entry.content:
Hi Hari,

Thanks for your response.

The field has been added in the condition contract header and in the business scenarios we have activated the copying into settlement document.

Since the field is now available on the settlement document, is it mandatory to add the field into the pricing structure or the routine can pick it up from the header?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Import Job taking significant time to import single record via Odata services?
entry.content: Doesn't seems to be normal.

entry.title: Custom table data Migration from SAP ECC to S4Hana using with / without BODS
entry.content:
Hello All,

There is always bunch of discussions, approaches on custom table migrations from SAP ECC to S/4HANA.

I summarized the methods that been utilized in my experience.

Here's a detailed step-by-step approach for migrating custom tables from SAP ECC to S/4HANA using SAP BODS, including load methods and best practices:

📌 Objective:

To migrate custom Z-tables from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA using SAP BODS (BusinessObjects Data Services), ensuring data accuracy, auditability, and system integrity.

🔁 Phases of Custom Table Migration

✅ 1. Pre-requisites

Task

Details

📄 Identify Tables

List all custom tables (Z* tables) to be migrated

🔐 Access Setup

Ensure BODS has access to ECC and S/4HANA systems (create datastores)

📂 Data Volume

Estimate the number of records to handle capacity planning

🛠️ Coordination

Collaborate with ABAP team for BAPI/IDoc if needed

🧾 Version Check

Ensure compatibility of ECC extractors and S/4 targets

🔍 2. Source ECC Setup (BODS Extraction)

Step

Method

🟢 ECC Datastore in BODS

Create Application server-based datastore

📤 Extract Table

Use Table Reader transform to extract data from custom Z-table (e.g., ZCUSTOM_DATA)

📐 Data Cleansing

Apply transformation using Query transform, remove blanks, trim strings, convert formats

📋 Delta Logic (optional)

Filter with date fields or change documents for incremental loads

🧭 3. Target S/4HANA Load Method (Options)

Load Method

Description

Usage

Direct DB Insert

Insert into S/4 custom Z-table if direct DB access is allowed

Least preferred (integrity risk)

BAPI / RFC Call

Use custom BAPI or FM created by ABAP team to handle inserts/updates

Recommended

IDoc

Use custom IDoc (ZIDOC) type to post data into S/4

Reliable for large volumes

Intermediate Staging

Load into staging DB (e.g., HANA) and use SLT or ABAP program to post to S/4

When performance is a concern or no interface is available

🔧 Work closely with the ABAP team to create the required Z_BAPI_LOAD_CUSTOM or IDoc type (if not existing).

🔄 4. BODS Job Design

  • Workflow:
    • Source Table Read → Transformation → Target Load
  • Job Elements:
    • Batch Job with Error handling
    • Validation logic (null checks, date formats, etc.)
    • Use Case Transform or Validation transform if needed
  • Use Auditing and logging to record success/failure count

🧪 5. Testing & Validation

Type

Action

✅ Unit Test

Load limited records first

📊 Reconciliation

Match record counts, key fields between ECC and S/4

🔍 Functional Validation

Ensure data is correctly reflected in S/4 via GUI

🔄 Re-run Capability

Add timestamp or keys for delta re-run or rollback options

📦 6. Deployment & Post-Migration

  • Document the job flows and configurations
  • Schedule BODS jobs (via Management Console or third-party scheduler)
  • Monitor first few loads manually
  • Archive logs and reconciliation reports

🧰 Example: ZSALES_MIGR Table Migration

Source

ECC → ZSALES_MIGR

BODS reads data

from ECC → ZSALES_MIGR

Transforms data

cleans up codes, formats, adds audit info

Loads to S/4HANA

via Z_BAPI_LOAD_SALES_MIGR BAPI

Post-checks

Validate in S/4 GUI with TCode SE16N

📌 Final Tips

  • 🚫 Avoid direct DB inserts to S/4 unless approved
  • 🔁 If data is large, consider batch-wise chunking
  • 📤 Maintain logs for each load (successful + failed)
  • 💬 Always align with functionals to confirm logic and structure

Happy Learning. please share your comments and feedback.

Thanks,

Venkatesh Golla

entry.content: Please create a ticket on this issue.

Hari

entry.title: Add a new custom field to the planning order screen (t-code: MD12)
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I would like to add a new custom field to the planning order screen (t-code: MD12).
I have searched for BAdI and exits but couldn't find any.
Could someone guide me on how to extend this functionality?

Best Regards,

entry.title: Unable to post asset retirement with customer – system requires a cost object for revenue GL account
entry.content:
We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, focusing solely on the Finance (FI) module. As part of our asset accounting process, we are trying to post a fixed asset retirement integrated with a customer using the standard “Asset Retirement with Customer (Integrated)” app. During this process, we select the relevant customer and fixed asset, and assign a revenue G/L account for the transaction. Additionally, we enter the profit center as required by the client for reporting purposes.

However, upon simulation or posting, the system throws error KI248 stating:
"Account xxxxxxxx requires a true account assignment relevant to cost accounting."
The error indicates that the profit center assignment is considered only statistical and therefore not sufficient for revenue postings to this G/L account, which is defined as a Primary Cost or Revenue account with Cost Element Category 11 (Revenue).

Our client is not implementing or Profitability Analysis (CO-PA), and we do not have any real CO objects such as internal orders, WBS elements, or sales orders configured or available in scope. The requirement is simple: to record revenue against profit centers so financial statements can be generated by profit center dimension. We do not want to (and should not need to) maintain real CO objects, as they are not part of the project scope.

Despite entering a profit center, the system requires a true cost accounting object due to the nature of the cost element category. Since we are not implementing CO-PA, this requirement is currently blocking a valid business process in SAP Public Cloud. The error seems to enforce controlling behavior, even when controlling is not part of the activated scope in the cloud tenant.

Therefore, we request SAP Support to advise on how this can be resolved. Ideally, we would like to continue using a revenue G/L account (to reflect revenue properly in the P&L) and post to it with only a profit center, without the need for any additional CO-relevant object. If there is a configuration workaround, scope item adjustment, or recommendation for using a different G/L setup for such scenarios in SAP Public Cloud, please advise accordingly.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud – Sales Order Image Attachments on Adobe Form
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility  @SAP SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database @ABAP @SAPCloud 

Dear All,

I’m currently working on a requirement in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud where I need to retrieve image attachments from a sales order or return order and display them on an Adobe Print Form.

Has anyone implemented a similar solution or come across any useful blogs or documentation that can guide this process?

Any suggestions, references, or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

 

Regards,

Muhammad Taqi

entry.title: Re: Automatically trigger synchronization of product cata...
entry.content: I did try it already and ended up in class cast exception while running the job which resulted in the ABORTED STATUS class de.hybris.platform.cronjob.jalo.CronJob cannot be cast to class de.hybris.platform.catalog.jalo.SyncItemCronJob

entry.title: How to have measures in between dimensions in SAC Table widget?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on a project where I need to customize the layout of a table in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). Specifically, I am required to position a measure between two dimensions in the table widget.

For instance, the default setup is as follows: Company Code, G/L Account, and Amount in TC. However, I need to rearrange it to: Company Code, Amount in TC, and G/L Account.

I understand that using a Measure-Based Dimension in a Calculated Dimension can achieve this.

 However, my challenge lies in the fact that my SAC table has numerous columns, and I'm unsure how to decide which columns should be included in the Dimension Context. If I add all the columns, it results in ‘null’ appearing in the calculated measure-based dimension.

Could you please guide me on how to efficiently determine which columns should be part of the Dimension Context, or if there's an alternative method to achieve the desired column arrangement without encountering null values?

entry.title: Re: Automatically trigger synchronization of product cata...
entry.content: Sharing the code snippet

entry.title: Re: Automatically trigger synchronization of product cata...
entry.content: $productCatalog=apparelProductCatalog $productSyncJob=sync $productCatalog:Staged->Online $sourceProductCV=sourceVersion(catalog(id[default=$productCatalog]),version[default='Staged'])[unique=true,default='$productCatalog:Staged'] $targetProductCV=targetVersion(catalog(id[default=$productCatalog]),version[default='Online'])[unique=true,default='$productCatalog:Online'] INSERT_UPDATE CatalogVersionSyncJob ; code[unique=true] ; $sourceProductCV ; $targetProductCV ; syncPrincipals(uid)[mode=append] ; syncPrincipalsOnly[default=false] ; removeMissingItems ; createNewItems ; rootTypes(code)[mode=append] ; $productSyncJob ; ; ; ; ; true ; true ; INSERT_UPDATE CronJob; code[unique = true] ; job(code)[unique = true] ; sessionLanguage(isoCode)[default = en] ; "sync apparelProductCatalog:Staged->Online"; "sync apparelProductCatalog\:Staged->Online" ; en INSERT_UPDATE Trigger ; job(code)[unique=true] ; cronExpression;relative[default=false];active[default=true];maxAcceptableDelay[default=-1] ; "sync apparelProductCatalog\:Staged->Online";"0 0 3 * * ?";;; INFO [hybrisHTTP6] [PerformCronJobAction] Performing CronJob CronJobModel (8796519465461@0) from Backoffice! INFO [sync apparelProductCatalog:Staged->Online::de.hybris.platform.catalog.jalo.synchronization.CatalogVersionSyncJob] (sync apparelProductCatalog:Staged->Online) [Slf4jAuditableActionHandler] session user changed ERROR [sync apparelProductCatalog:Staged->Online::de.hybris.platform.catalog.jalo.synchronization.CatalogVersionSyncJob] (sync apparelProductCatalog:Staged->Online) [Job] Caught throwable class de.hybris.platform.cronjob.jalo.CronJob cannot be cast to class de.hybris.platform.catalog.jalo.SyncItemCronJob (de.hybris.platform.cronjob.jalo.CronJob and de.hybris.platform.catalog.jalo.SyncItemCronJob are in unnamed module of loader de.hybris.bootstrap.loader.PlatformInPlaceClassLoader @40a39d05) java.lang.ClassCastException: class de.hybris.platform.cronjob.jalo.CronJob cannot be cast to class de.hybris.platform.catalog.jalo.SyncItemCronJob (de.hybris.platform.cronjob.jalo.CronJob and de.hybris.platform.catalog.jalo.SyncItemCronJob are in unnamed module of loader de.hybris.bootstrap.loader.PlatformInPlaceClassLoader @40a39d05) at de.hybris.platform.catalog.jalo.synchronization.CatalogVersionSyncJob.canPerform(CatalogVersionSyncJob.java:154) at de.hybris.platform.cronjob.jalo.Job.execute(Job.java:1380) at de.hybris.platform.cronjob.jalo.Job.performImpl(Job.java:820) at de.hybris.platform.cronjob.jalo.Job$JobRunable.run(Job.java:688) at de.hybris.platform.util.threadpool.PoolableThread.internalRun(PoolableThread.java:204) at de.hybris.platform.core.threadregistry.RegistrableThread.run(RegistrableThread.java:124)

entry.title: Re: Database table for business volume data is stored for...
entry.content: The requirement is to have the rebate eligibility based on a different material and the rebate based on a different material.If the customer purchases 100EA of Material A ,only then he is eligible for a rebate on Material B at a 5% rate.So we are trying to store the Material A and Quantity 100 EA in custom fields. Based on these fields we are planning to check for eligibility in the pricing routine.Both Material A and Material B will be added in the business volume selection critieria.

entry.title: sub: i am destination error 500
entry.content:
hi experts,

i am getting error as 500 to this url - http://s4h2023gen.mydomain.com:8000/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV

if you have faced this error please help me to solve this error

entry.title: Re: Automatically trigger synchronization of product cata...
entry.content:
Hello,

I think the error was coming from Cron job impex, which is not needed. 

Comment & try with below snippet. 

Thanks ! 

$productCatalog = apparelProductCatalog
$productSyncJob = sync $productCatalog:Staged->Online
$sourceProductCV = sourceVersion(catalog(id[default = $productCatalog]), version[default = 'Staged'])[unique = true, default = '$productCatalog:Staged']
$targetProductCV = targetVersion(catalog(id[default = $productCatalog]), version[default = 'Online'])[unique = true, default = '$productCatalog:Online']

INSERT_UPDATE CatalogVersionSyncJob; code[unique = true]; $sourceProductCV; $targetProductCV; syncPrincipals(uid)[mode = append]; syncPrincipalsOnly[default = false]; removeMissingItems; createNewItems; rootTypes(code)[mode = append]
                                   ; $productSyncJob    ;                 ;                 ;                                   ;                                    ; true              ; true          ;

#INSERT_UPDATE CronJob; code[unique = true]                  ; job(code)[unique = true]                   ; sessionLanguage(isoCode)[default = en]
#                     ; sync $productCatalog\:Staged->Online ; sync apparelProductCatalog\:Staged->Online ; en

INSERT_UPDATE Trigger; job(code)[unique = true]             ; cronExpression; relative[default = false]; active[default = true]; maxAcceptableDelay[default = -1]
                     ; sync $productCatalog\:Staged->Online ; "0 0 3 * * ?" ;                          ;                       ;

entry.title: Re: Automatically trigger synchronization of product catalogs in sap commerce cloud
entry.content:
Hello, 

I think class cast exception is coming from the Cron Job update impex, which may not be needed. 
Comment & try with below corrections. 

Thanks! 

$productCatalog = apparelProductCatalog
$productSyncJob = sync $productCatalog:Staged->Online
$sourceProductCV = sourceVersion(catalog(id[default = $productCatalog]), version[default = 'Staged'])[unique = true, default = '$productCatalog:Staged']
$targetProductCV = targetVersion(catalog(id[default = $productCatalog]), version[default = 'Online'])[unique = true, default = '$productCatalog:Online']

INSERT_UPDATE CatalogVersionSyncJob; code[unique = true]; $sourceProductCV; $targetProductCV; syncPrincipals(uid)[mode = append]; syncPrincipalsOnly[default = false]; removeMissingItems; createNewItems; rootTypes(code)[mode = append]
                                   ; $productSyncJob    ;                 ;                 ;                                   ;                                    ; true              ; true          ;

#INSERT_UPDATE CronJob; code[unique = true]                  ; job(code)[unique = true]                   ; sessionLanguage(isoCode)[default = en]
#                     ; sync $productCatalog\:Staged->Online ; sync apparelProductCatalog\:Staged->Online ; en

INSERT_UPDATE Trigger; job(code)[unique = true]             ; cronExpression; relative[default = false]; active[default = true]; maxAcceptableDelay[default = -1]
                     ; sync $productCatalog\:Staged->Online ; "0 0 3 * * ?" ;                          ;                       ;

entry.title: Re: Request for Guidance on Resolving ChaRM Issue Post-SAP BW Migration to SAP S/4 HANA RISE with SA
entry.content: Dear Srinivas, since an answer was provided to your question, and there has been no other activity on the topic, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Android Studio with SAP-BTP-SDK-for-Android
entry.content: Resolved after setting the legacy password, bottom right, via https://account.sap.com/manage/accounts

entry.title: Event Notification Subscription
entry.content:
I am integrating with the sap successfactors RCM and I want to use assessment vendors
So what I am doing is I am adding assessment vendors from Manage Assessment Vendors and than I am adding in provisioning Import/Export Assessment Vendor Packages and adding assessment csv 
and than I am subscribing in Event Notification subscription with the endpoint url 
here 

The endpoint url is the webhook that i have created and it is being able to save.
But When I create the Job requisition and add Assessment Assciation some thing like this

By adding this and create a Job requisition and than invite the candidate and move it to the stage that the Assessment Assciation is set up in like this

it should trigger the event that we have subscribed to but it is not triggering the event and I am not recieving the event value so can you please guide If I am missing something 
and tell me how to do the assessment integration It would be really helpful.

entry.title: Print page number in bottom of each label in EHS label printing
entry.content: My requirement is to print page number at bottom of each label printed. If user selects 3 copies to be printed, it should display Page 1, Page 2, Page 3 on respective labels. Please guide how can this be achieved.

entry.title: Ariba CIG Mapping: How to add custom field in the target structure?
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We have a requirement to map an existing attribute from CIG's cXML ConfirmationRequest document type to S4HANA's orderconfirmationrequest SOAP XML. 

I am pretty new to SAP Ariba CIG and unfortunately, unable to identify how to create a custom target field in the S4HANA target structure. 

Is this possible since most of the blogs online only talk about Extrinsic fields from CIG cXML? I haven't seen any examples yet where the modification is done on the target structure. 

Below is the screenshot of what we are trying to map out to S4HANA:

Thank you for the help here.

entry.title: Re: Navigate in RAP via Button from root to subnode, not via standard arrow
entry.content: I added a screen shot to the question. With a regular arrow, the user doesn't know that he can upload attachments in detail of the root node. With an 'Attachment' (Bijlage) button, he does know. That's why we want to change the arrow to a button that navigates like the arrow.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Transformation Center: End to End Digita...
entry.content:
Dear Abhinav, 

Thank you for your effort on this blog. You have created this content in Technology Q&A, which is a "question and answer" the forum. Your content has been framed as a forum question instead of as content to consume.

This content is more appropriate for the Technology Blogs by Members page.
In the future, please post such blog content in that area instead of in the Q&A page.

Thank you & best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Scrap Document Reports
entry.content:
How to view historical scrap records in the system?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Scrap Document Reports
entry.content:
For inventory related scrap for the product in any logistics area is related to change in inventory, so the system generates a confirmation ID which updates finance as well for every scrap. These scrap records can be checked via the confirmation journal report with inventory change having respective confirmation ID.

We have reports also for inventory scrap against production orders and production-related scrap can be checked via Yield and Scrap report. (Report ID:SCMYASU01_Q0001). It provides the quantities of yield and scrap recorded for a production order.

entry.title: Re: RAP - Long Text, larger output and/or Text Editor?
entry.content: Hello @Sdineshmiracle , i could do it as Marian suggested, a custom section with an RTE, i guess it's the easy way to achieve it, i will put it to git and i can share

entry.title: Re: S4 - Migration - Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello Aakash,

The tags have been adjusted accordingly to attract more attentions from my colleagues.

If you are talking about the Readiness Check report mentioned in Note 2913617 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA, it supports the Custom Code Analysis via ABAP Test Cockpit before migrating ERP to S/4HANA.

The ABAP test cockpit is an alternative custom code analysis tool supported by SAP Readiness Check. The ABAP test cockpit will perform a more in-depth analysis in comparison to the Custom Code Analyzer. However, it must be highlighted that there are additional steps required to enable this analysis. The process for establishing an ABAP test cockpit system for performing this analysis is documented here.

SAP Note 2781766 must be implemented on the system where the ABAP test cockpit is installed and enabled. If that system is >= SAP_BASIS 7.53 SP3 or >= SAP_BASIS 7.52 SP5, SAP Note 2781766 is not required, as the functionality is already available in those releases.

To create the ZIP archive in the ABAP test cockpit for upload to SAP Readiness Check, select the context menu option Export to -> File for SAP Readiness Check in the ABAP test cockpit result browser.

Similar to the Customer Code Analyzer, the ABAP test cockpit analysis is conducted outside of the program RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA and is later uploaded to the analysis created on the landing page of SAP Readiness Check.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 Fully-Activated Appliance: Known Issues
entry.content:
@MarceloUQFN 

this may have multiple root causes eg. string ‚sap’ in your password (specific to 2023 FPS02), hyperscaler quota/restrictions (can you see anything in the Azure logs), etc. ?

If the problem persists, please ask a question in https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/cloud-appliance-library , since answering, searching etc. works better there compared to blog comments.

Best, Joerg

entry.title: Authentication Error - Issue with Sending Emails via sap-cloud-sdk/mail-client in SAP BTP CAP App
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have been using the sap-cloud-sdk/mail-client in my SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) Cloud Application Programming (CAP) application to send emails. This functionality has been working smoothly for several months without any issues. However, over the past few days, I’ve started encountering the following error when attempting to send emails:

I Observe that the email fails to send, and the error message ERROR (mail-client): Invalid login: 535 5.7.3  Authentication unsuccessful is displayed in the BAS console.

I have tried resetting the app password for both my Gmail and Outlook accounts, but the error persists.

Could you kindly assist me in troubleshooting and resolving this issue as soon as possible? This issue is affecting my ability to send emails, and I would appreciate any guidance or solutions you can provide.

Thank you for your support.

Regards,

Syed

entry.title: Re: On Premise / Private Cloud Fiori Launchpad - News in New My Home
entry.content: Hi @CarolineWelsh, thank you. At the moment I use a sample CSV from the whats new fewer. When I fill it with our own data it also works, but the Link with more information is buggy. From the news tile the dots . in the url are replaced with a comma ,. Did you maybe heard about that?

entry.title: Re: EWM Good Receipt Posting - INV20006 Error
entry.content:
In the screenshot, the error message indicates that the stock already exists. Since we don't know the previous steps of the EWM GR in the PP, if there had SFC complete, you can refer to the reason provided in Question 2 of this SAP Note:

🔗 SAP Note 3544506

Alternatively, you can use the Packing Service, which follows the same logic as the Packing Unit Plug-in.

entry.title: While performing the intra-STO process
entry.content:
Hello Team,

While performing the intra-STO process, I created a delivery using VL10B. However, when attempting to post the goods issue from the delivery, I encountered the following error:

 

Only  0 serial numbers entered instead of 1,000

Message no. IO304

Diagnosis

There is a serial number obligation, so the number of serial numbers must equal the number of serial numbers in the material document.

You can post the operation only if you entered the correct number of serial numbers previously.

System Response

Depending on the context in which the error arises, the system continues 

processing, or the required function cannot be performed.

Procedure

You have the following options, for example:
 

  • Check that the serial numbers are entered fully.
  • If necessary, display an error log.
  • If necessary, contact your system administrator.

 

Could you please assist in resolving this issue?
SAP Community

entry.title: sub contracting process
entry.content:
Hello Team,

While executing the subcontracting process, I performed a goods issue using movement type 541. Subsequently, when attempting to perform a goods receipt with movement type 101, I encountered the following error:

Valuation of material ********** in valuation area ****  inconsistent.

 

valuation area *** for period ***. The valuation data contained in the material ledger differ from that in the material master.

System Response

The system will not allow the transaction to be posted, so that the inconsistency does not become any greater.

Procedure

To analyze consistency, please carry out the following transaction.

Check the valuation data for any subsequent periods that exist

 

Could you please assist in resolving this issue?
#SAP MM

entry.title: Re: Calling OData services in SAP Digital Mnaufacturing
entry.content:
Hi Harsh-ctrl, i know that has been a while but...

 

1) i dont know if you are using Cloud Connector or not, but i'm assuming YES

2) you should use only http://{host}:{port}  on VIRTUAL HOST on servers

3) on your custom service registry you should attach your WebServer (as you did) but on the url/path you should not attach the entire url, but just the path that arrives by removing the web servers path, like this:

Path WebServer host/virtual url:  https://xxxx.yyyyy.com:443  (the same configured inside Cloud Connector)

 
Path Service Registry: /sap/opu/odata/SAP/XXXXXXXXXXXX/A_bbbbbbb

entry.title: Re: Stock data of serial number XXXXXXX not suitable for...
entry.content:
There is a KBA on this message: 3438882 - Error IO231 - Stock data of serial number not suitable for movement - during goods movement - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA 

  • Read the message long text for inconsistent field name, value in Serial Number (IQ03), value in mvt (MIGO)
  • In Support Content, look at Inconsistency in Material Management - Inventory Management if correction is not obvious.

entry.title: Re: Condition Contract - Distribution process
entry.content:
Dear Victor,

Thank you very much for your contribution, and apologies for the late reply — we took some time to evaluate how to apply your suggestions.

To reply to your questions:

  • reason for this approach? M: it is based on the business requirement to do not post the settlement if open accruals are not sufficient. Therefore, the process would be: 1. to adjust the accruals; 2. to post then the settlement. Purpose of the custom routine is to get this two steps in one, without any manual input.
  • Would it not be more effective to apply the logic of reversing open accruals only up to the net settlement amount? M: if we apply that new setup, how then they can get "missing Accruals" automatically posted, if any?

    Therefore: it is not clear to me how the solution you're suggesting should cover that requirement.

    Moreover, as additional scenario which is not covered at all: since our current Distribution Category is = 3 (std - Based on Accruals), how a manual settlement can be posted if there are no Accruals, given SD source volumes are totally absent due to a small lag between Accruals execution vs Payment execution? Should we enhance the Distribution Category applying a kind of "fall-back" logic, which also looks at a distribution based on "Settlement Documents" when there are no Accruals? Are there other std. ways to handle this scenario?

    Thanks again

    Michele

entry.title: Re: Integration SAP Public Cloud and SAP Sales Cloud V2
entry.content:
Hello,

To address the integration issue regarding the email address not being synchronized between SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and SAP Sales Cloud V2, you can take the following steps:

Steps to Resolve Email Synchronization Issue

  1. Check Master Data Configuration: Ensure that the email address field is correctly configured in both systems. In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, use the ‘Manage Customer Master Data’ app to confirm the email address is maintained for the contact person.

  2. Integration Settings: Verify the configuration settings for integration between SAP Public Cloud and Sales Cloud V2. Ensure that all relevant fields, including email address, are set to synchronize.

  3. Custom Integration Content: If there are custom fields or logic involved, check that these have been correctly implemented and mapped in your integration flows.

  4. Review SAP CPI Configuration: Utilize SAP CPI (SAP Cloud Platform Integration) to facilitate seamless communication between the two systems. Ensure OAuth authentication is properly set up from CPI to Sales Cloud V2 and from Sales Cloud to CPI.

  5. Debug and Log Analysis: Use debugging tools or logs to trace the flow of data. Identify any errors or points where the email data is not transferring correctly.

Resources

  • To maintain email addresses correctly in the SAP Public Cloud:

    • Manage Customer Master Data App 3090881 - Contact person’s email address is not copied over from customer master data - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition provides guidance on maintaining correct email addresses in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.
  • For integration and synchronization:
  • Refer to SAP Integration Suite documentation SAP and SalesForce Custom Integration flows - SAP Community for integration flows between SAP S/4HANA and external systems like Sales Cloud.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: How to work with exemptions using ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud during development in an
entry.content:

Coul you please suggest how to make  'Approve ATC Exemption' app visible?

Thank you

Mikail

entry.title: Re: While performing the intra-STO process
entry.content: Check SAP note 3477702

entry.title: Re: Data Doesn’t Drive the Business - Trust Does. SAP Business Data Cloud Delivers.
entry.content:
@anthonywojcik honestly, I don't like your Blog!

Why? Because you are 30.000 feet above ground with it 🙄

Of course you are right, in an ideal world, if a company is fine with SAP standard, keeps the core clean and avoids any process or data changes outside of the predefined world. Then the Insight Apps will work perfectly.

But you ignore some vital facts - the real world! Companies are like they are: They want and have their own fields, their own processes and their own master data everywhere! This is the truth! And getting this into your ideal world scenario takes months or years of efforts. You know it, if you have S4 transition experience.

And one more thing: If you are an "architect, a data engineer" or someone developing or administrating developments in Datasphere - like me - then you know it is not the truth what you describe in a real world scenario. If you have several systems, then you can have different master data and then you have to harmonize it anyway.

You mix up different things in your blog and just describe the fancy marketing terms.

Your blog is not helpful at all, because it completely neglects the way to achieve everything you describe.

Let's face it: Majority of BW Customers will have the same efforts in PCE & BCD as if they would start all over again in Datasphere from the beginning ... because the end in 2030 is unavoidable in both cases, in PCE and on Prem.

The reality about trust is that SAP lost some trust... in BW Customers who have initially been told to leave their BW behind and start newly in SAP Datasphere. Then they had to recognize that they could have taken part of its over in the BW Bridge, one year later. And finally in 2025 those who started with the one or the other way are probably mad now, as they could have taken over their complete BW system into the private Cloud in BDC.

I could continue with even more topics, but I will stop here... I think you got the point?!

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: BTP Integration Suite_Service Contract screen IF erro...
entry.content:
Hello,

To implement a scenario where pressing the ‘Save’ button Use SAP BTP Integration Suite to Integrate S4/HANA… on an S/4HANA Cloud Service Contract initiates integration with SAP BTP Integration Suite, the following steps can be taken:

  1. Trigger Integration Flow: You can configure the SAP S/4HANA Cloud system to trigger an integration flow upon saving the Service Contract. This is typically done using communication arrangements that link specific actions in S/4HANA with integration flows on the SAP BTP Integration Suite.

  2. Handling Errors: To display error messages on the Service Contract screen when an error occurs during integration, the integration flow can be designed to send back response messages. Changes can be made in the integration flow to capture errors and relay them back to the S/4HANA Cloud system.

  3. Display Error Messages: SAP S/4HANA can be configured to listen for these error responses. Custom logic can be implemented in the UI—possibly extending the Service Contract application—to check for these responses and display appropriate error messages.

  4. Implement BTP Error Handling: On the BTP Integration Suite side, ensure that the integration flow has proper error handling in place. Use features such as error end events, throw alerts or messages, or write error logs that can be sent back to the originating system.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: A/P Invoice direct posting against more than one Cond...
entry.content:
Dear Victor,

many thanks for your input. Nevertheless, what you're proposing would be applicable for Manual Settlement process triggered by an external system (e.g TPM).

Even if the API you've suggested can cover the requirement from a technical perspective, the business requirement to be covered is: to post one A/P Invoice (e.g reference ID 1234) which than is split between:

  • Contract A - Manual Settlement 1111
  • Contract B - Manual Settlement 2222 Contract
  • C - Manual Settlement 3333

Although, from a legal standpoint, splitting an A/P Invoice ID (1234) vs Multiple Settlement Documents is not admitted. Therefore, a design solution that could be applied would be "2-Steps Manual Settlement" (with Collection). Given that, the process flow will be:

  1. To receive External A/P Invoice 1234
  2. To create Manual Settlement documents 1111 / 2222 / 3333
  3. To create Collective Settlement document, 9999 via WZRC t-code, which cumulate Settl. Documents. 1111 / 2222 / 3333 at collective settlement doc. item level

In this way, the legal requirement is covered: relationship between A/P Invoice & Settlement Document is always 1:1, as it is linked to the Collective Settlement document 9999.

I'm not sure if what I've reported is in line with your experience, but so far, we're facing a new challange regarding WZRC usage: since we would schedule an automatic job to execute it, how can we guarantee Settlement Documents are "cumulated" based on the proper A/P reference ID? In our basic example: the program should "understand" & collect Manual Settlement documents 1111 / 2222 / 3333 based on the Reference ID 1234 (which is the original A/P Invoice ID, that would be then tracked into each settlement document, as External Invoice ID).

Thank you in advance

Michele

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration Utilities - Upload Value Mapping Entries based on JSON/X
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: How to bind sap.fe.macros table to data from association?
entry.content: Hi Nikbereziuk, Don't know if you got the answer for this question yet but If the metaPath cannot understand your path to the root entity's association, maybe you can try to annotate your root entity's association and setup the line item in that: annotate BatchRelease.ChangeHistory with @( LineItem : [ ....... ], ) and then try to bind it to macros table by using path directly to your root entity's association like /ChangeHistory/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem

entry.title: Re: EWM Good Receipt Posting - INV20006 Error
entry.content:
Thank you @carol_cai for the information.

We have added the DisableGR=True for the yield confirmation so that GR should not post when SFC complete. 

So in this case, when we try to post the EWM GR again using POST GOOD RECEIPT service, it should work without any issue. but it does not. 

Link - https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/manage-collaboration-directives?q=DisableGR=True

Also, when we use the Packing Unit plugin and pack the HU, it creates the EWM GR request automatically without any issue. (even after SFC completed) but when we try to pack the HU using PPD (using close packing unit service), then it does not create the EWM GR request and that's why we are trying to post it again using POST GR service in PPD but there also getting error as stock is already available. 

Thanks,

Nikhil Gupta

entry.title: Re: Advanced Bank Account Management (J77) - Create Bank...
entry.content: Hello Jeremy, the same fields are availabile in our Starter system but not in Customizing system. I suppose it's a CBC activity since but the test script doesn't say anything about that. And it's not just the contact persons, it's the whole Bank Relatiopnship section. Please take a look at my screenshot from the Starter system.

entry.title: Re: SAP Trail Integration suite trail version
entry.content:
hello @YasminM2025 , I see you added all roles, for info the one that matters here is: Integration_Provisioner.

You can also make sure that your account has the logon permission, it should be by default but doesn't hurt to check:

First check which Identity Provider your account is assigned to:

(it should be Default identity provider by default).


Then check if it allows logon:

(make sure "Available for User Logon' has a tick)

Sometimes it can also be as simple as a 'session bug' and if you simply close the browser then open and login again it works (happens more often than one would assume).

entry.title: Re: Inactive Objects to be maintained from SU24 without d...
entry.content: yes. we find variant is flexible option for Authorizations maintenance. We are too disagreeing with them. Especially for Non-business users its way to hard to remove inactive from SU24. Thank you so much for your response.
